properties.name: Bore hole pipe
properties.description: Main water supply from the borehole. 1.5" HDPE, Class D (thicker, higher-pressure).

properties.name: School garden edge pipe
properties.description: Runs the full width of the school garden plot, from the corner nearest the tanks to the far corner. The original surveyed pipe only reached partway; extended straight to the far corner, ending in a tap. 1.5" HDPE, Class C distribution line.

properties.name: School garden header pipe
properties.description: New header line: runs the plot's length from the tank-side corner, then turns and runs the width, feeding 5 taps along the way. 1.5" HDPE.

properties.name: Main women's garden pipe
properties.description: Main line through the middle of the women's garden. 1.5" HDPE, Class C distribution line — about 90 m to the far end of the women's garden side.

properties.name: Scoop sub pipe
properties.description: Runs the length of a garden bed.
